docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT GREENBOX, LLC, A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
